description: Dr. Cog is a deck-building roguelike game using gears. Operate the memory restoration machine, turn gears, discover and enhance them, and build synergies. Complete the memory restoration within the time limit, recover the client's lost memories, and reach the final chapter.

name: Noble's Life: Kingdom Reborn - Prologue
description: Experience the first months after a brutal assault on your own estate in the free prologue of a realistic simulator of a medieval noble combined with a strategy game of historical depth. Manage your town and villages and make decisions in non-linear events.

name: Just Squat
description: Just Squat is a shmup and visual Nobel game that focuses on boss fight by growing up a boy. Grow the boy by encountering various events at the gym and school, and push Babel out with all your might! The difficulty of boss fight and the boy's growth will be determined by the exercise you choose!

name: BROK - Natal Tail, A New Christmas
description: A Christmas tale set in the world of BROK the InvestiGator, presented as a visual novel.

name: 女王蟻のPerfume エピソード０-切り裂きジャックの狂愛-/Queen Ant Perfume Episode0-The Mad Love of Jack the Ripper-
description: A visual novel game set in “London at the end of the 19th century” and “modern Tokyo”. The game depicts a love episode between you and a male suspect that “Watson-kun,” the assistant of a famous detective (you), witnesses while investigating a threatening letter sent by Jack the Ripper.

name: 沉舟：序章
description: Play as a group of underground workers who fight in the dark, and stage a treacherous spy war story in Nanjing during World War II. How will you respond to identity crises, betrayals, and collapsed beliefs? Loyalty or betrayal, abandon others or be abandoned...

name: 偕老同穴 Euplectella
description: A short Visual Novel. Player will play as a reclusive writer who explores in her own dreams by moving and clicking, listening to and recording the story of a dream-prisoner. As the story progresses, she can no longer remain detached ...

name: The Ouroboros Express
description: Play as Vivienne Sanssouci, a daring journalist who has been tasked to review the Ouroboros Express. She quickly notices that this is not your regular train—and a devastating secret changes her life forever, and that of the other passengers…

name: DEAD LAMB WALKING
description: A story about a dead lamb walking.

name: Mr. Rightaway
description: 古风多结局乙女向文字冒险游戏，完全免费

name: Fateful Destiny
description: Can you uncover the truth, or will the mystery remain buried? Explore a village, make final choices, and shape a story you can never undo.
notes: Có DLC trả phí 💀 Dead game (no players ≥14d)

name: Arima Lodge
description: One of Arima Lodge's bellhops rides the elevator for his usual shift, but, after a man rushes into the elevator and compels him to get to the rooftop instead, he starts to realize something very serious is amiss.

name: Dogs
description: Dogs is a relaxing and fun game where you click on adorable dogs to increase your score. Featuring a variety of cute dog breeds, simple gameplay, and charming visuals, it's perfect for dog lovers and players of all ages.

name: TOY BOX
description: A pull-apart puzzle visual novel whose fragments stitch the story together.

name: JOBifAI
description: Land your dream job with JOBifAI! With an impressive CV and AI-crafted portfolio, you've got an interview at Grizley Studios! However, you forgot what you submitted... can you convince the art director that you're the perfect fit anyway?

name: Final Hour
description: In a world on its deathbed, explore and connect with your neighbors for one last day.

name: BubbleBeast DigiDungeon
description: Pop bubbles, fight monsters, and keep rocking to the beat in BubbleBeast DigiDungeon, an arcade-style music puzzle game!

name: Cryspace
description: Cryspace is a fresh visual novel with a nostalgic flavor. Talk to your friends online, meet with them in-person, and allow your friend group to grow in numbers, or fall into despair through your own decision-making and discretion. Experience the first few dates with Sam for FREE.

name: Hail Britannia
description: Hail Britannia is a text-based game with lite RPG elements set in an alternate 1944 where the Central Powers won World War 1.

name: akabos
description: Do you hate squares? Then this game is for you! After all, the dog also hates squares. Help the dog to destroy all the squares!

name: Sol
description: Fa mesos que ha desaparegut el sol, però el despertador continua sonant cada dia a les 8:00. Una novel·la visual en català.

name: 作为游戏和诗歌的世界
description: 优尔·阿莱夫和妹妹安雅·阿莱夫在幼年时因病被父母抛弃，后被爱尔兰都柏林的一家酒馆的老板娘西尔莎收留。在一次出差过程中，优尔意外的邂逅了自己梦中来历不明的少女，后得知对方的名字叫做艾尔温。面对这个熟悉又陌生的少女，优尔和她踏上了收集手稿和解开过去真相的旅程。

name: 失欲
description: 《失欲》是一部基於帝國主義時期歐洲的短篇反烏托邦小說，它通過多線敘事，描繪了奧盧格帝國從資本主義逐漸過渡到半奴役制度的過程，呼籲人們反資本、反戰、反封建。 The English version is still being translated and produced.

name: All We Need
description: All We Need is a first-person horror exploration. Uncover supernatural mysteries, face chilling encounters, and navigate haunting landscapes. Unravel the consequences of Jack's fateful decision. Survive the psychological challenges that await. Can you escape the horrors?

name: I Wanna Be A Game Dev!
description: Live out your school days as you navigate the rocky world of game development! Can you make an amazing game, or will something get in the way?

name: Echoes of Madness - The Hawthorne Case
description: Detective Norman faces one of the longest nights of his career. Alone, he searches for the missing girl, Felicia, only to discover that this case runs far deeper than he ever imagined.

name: Shiina Taki's Decameron
description: Shiina Taki's Decameron is a doujin interactive fiction based on anime「BanG Dream! It's MyGO!!!!!」. The story concentrates on Shiina Taki, the drummer and song writer of MyGO!!!!! and her fight against fate till the last breath.

name: Angel Wings: Endless Night
description: Trapped in a haunted mansion with only your wits and an unlikely ally at your side, what will it take to survive this endless nightmare?

name: 잿빛의 행성
description: is an adventure game where you meet the Big Dipper, a star that grants wishes, and save the planet that has turned gray.

name: Itsy Bitsy Spider: Vengeance
description: Itsy Bitsy Spider: Vengeance is a fast-paced movement-shooter roguelite with a focus on speedrunning. Take control of a spider with a gun who is tasked with fighting it's way to the top of the waterspout!

name: 28 Leicester Square
description: Something has gone wrong at the 28 Leicester Square manor. Danger lurks around every corner. In this horror puzzle game, you will uncover the truth of what happened to this place and reveal secrets that should have stayed hidden. Every man has two sides; let's just hope you help the right one.

name: DREADHOLM
description: A dark fantasy isometric online RPG featuring classes, randomized loot, instanced dungeons, and party-based boss fights. Built from scratch by a solo developer. Free to play, no microtransactions.

name: False Flag
description: False Flag is a small platform game where the goal isn’t to reach the end. Instead, you need to find a way to die in each level. Every stage is about figuring out how to fail.

name: Recipe For Disaster
description: Recipe for Disaster is an all new competitive multiplayer cooking game with a game show format. As an aspiring chef, gather ingredients to build powerful food-themed weapons and fight against your friends!

name: ToyBoxers!
description: Punch, Shoot, Or Explode your friends to be the last toy standing in this fast paced physics PVP party game!

name: Set Yourself on Fire
description: A quiet town awaits death. Two young women fall in love.

name: Drowned Caves
description: Atmospheric, short, and simple adventure puzzle game that gives the player freedom in finding the solution to the obstacles they encounter along the way in the drowned caves.

name: The Brewline - Prologue
description: Step into the world of bootleg booze in this story-driven, single-player sim! Grow your crops, brew your drinks, bond with eccentric customers, and bottle it all under your own brand. Uncover the truth behind your brother’s arrest, complete quirky missions, and build your underground empire.

name: Selena's Charm: Sweet Home
description: A free-to-start match-3 puzzle game with mansion restoration and decorating. Play the first 20 levels, help Selena begin bringing a grand home back to life, and unlock the full experience through DLC.

name: 暗黑战神
description: 经典永不褪色，热血再度沸腾！以原汁原味的传奇玩法为核心，打造高爆率、高自由度的MMORPG盛宴。在这里，装备全靠打，神装遍地爆，刀刀暴击、秒怪升级的极致爽感贯穿全程！

name: 16 Personalities Simulator
description: 本游戏是基于荣格心理学理论，以及现在时代的环境制作的测试分享交流游戏。游戏免费，没有任何内购要素，给您带来纯净的测试和分享体验。

name: 驱入虚空
description: Into the Void is a sci-fi third-person action shooter focused on loot collection and build synergy. Freely combine armor, weapons, and mechs across diverse levels. Obtain all gear through gameplay. Befriend Chronomancers, and save a world plunged into chaos by the fall of the Celestial Palace.
developer: 杭州紧张树科技有限公司
publisher: 海南紧张树科技有限公司

name: Predecessor
description: Inspired by the legacy of Paragon, built with love by the community, and powered by Unreal Engine 5, Predecessor is the ultimate fusion of shooter action and MOBA strategy. Join more than 2,000,000 players and play for FREE now!

name: UNDECEMBER: 4th Anniversary
description: UNDECEMBER is a Hack & Slash Action RPG in which players are able to surpass the conventional limits of skills by endlessly combining variety of Skill and Link Runes. Become a Rune Hunter and experience the joy of farming and growth!

name: Deceit 2
description: Deceit 2 is an online social deduction horror game. Inspire fear as the Infected, investigate as the Innocent, or create mayhem as the Cursed. Trapped with friends and strangers: who can you trust to help you escape?

name: SPLITGATE: Arena Reloaded
description: SPLITGATE: Arena Reloaded fuses the best of Splitgate 1 & 2, bringing back that classic arena shooter feel. Jump into fast-paced arena modes or drop into Arena Royale, a battle royale built on arena DNA. Play Season 2 now.

name: Stronghold Kingdoms
description: A massively multiplayer grand strategy game, Stronghold Kingdoms is about forging alliances, political mind games, city-building and castle sieges with thousands of other players!

name: 天月麻雀 (Amatsuki Mahjong)
description: Amatsuki Mahjong is a ACG style mahjong game that offers real-time multiplayer online matches. It features four styles of mahjong: Japanese, Sichuan, Taiwanese, and Hong Kong Mahjong. Enjoy a variety of play styles tailored to your preferences.

name: Blackjack 21: Blackjackist
description: Blackjack is an exciting game that any player is sure to enjoy. Place your bet, get more points than the dealer and win chips. Feel the risk as you dive into the casino atmosphere and hit the big time!

name: Pool 2D - Poolians
description: Pool 2D is a free pool game including 8-ball,9-ball,15-ball,3-ball,rotation and blackjack. The graphics are spectacular and the physics are realistic and accurate. Whether you play against the computer or against real players from all over the world online, the action is smooth and fast paced!

name: Poker Championship
description: Play the most authentic Texas Hold’em Poker App. Fair play guaranteed by the officially certified Random Number Generator implemented for every hand dealing. Compete with outstanding players throughout the world in real time and be the World Champion!

name: Shadowverse CCG
description: Four million battles every day. One Shadowverse. Japan's #1 strategic card game. Made by card gamers for card gamers.

name: AdventureQuest 3D
description: The Void King is raising an army in secret. Death has chosen you as his champion to bring him down. Adventure & quest alongside your friends in this bizarre cross-platform MMORPG from the creators of the original, and comically-redundantly named... AdventureQuest! Weekly releases!

name: SCP: Containment Breach 2
description: Survive the chaos of SCP Foundation! Step into a thrilling SCP horror experience with story-driven co-op, intense PvP Breach mode, and randomized maps. Play as Class-D, scientist, SCPs, and more, each role bringing unique challenges in an unpredictable, immersive facility.

name: The Walking Dead: No Man's Land
description: Step into the dangerous world of The Walking Dead: No Man's Land. Lead survivors in turn-based strategy battles, manage resources, and make tough choices to ensure their survival. Fight walkers, build your base, and face endless dangers.

name: Tank Force: Online Shooter Game
description: Tank Force - the coolest free online tank shooter! This is a new word in online tank battles, which combines the best qualities of a tank simulator and thrilling arcade battles.

name: Rogue Company
description: Join 20+ million players in Rogue Company, the ultimate third-person tactical action shooter! Become an agent of Rogue Company and wield powerful weapons, high-tech gadgets, and game-changing abilities. Accept the mission and jump into a variety of 4v4 and 6v6 game modes. Play FREE today!

name: Operation: New Earth
description: Operation: New Earth is an intense sci-fi multiplayer strategy game in which you must command an advanced military facility to defend Earth from a hostile alien invasion. Create an alliance, gather resources, and unlock advanced technology to level up your stronghold!

name: Vegas Casino & Slots: Slottist
description: Discover the world's best Casino Slots Games! Play slots with unique game mechanics, explore amazing mini-games and master your casino skills!

name: SAS: Zombie Assault 4
description: Purge the undead! Intense action-shooter with deep rpg elements, including upgradeable guns and armor, unique class skills, and class special abilities. Entire game can be played single player or as a 4-player online co-op game, including PvP events like Last Man Standing.

name: Warhammer The Horus Heresy: Legions
description: A card battler based in the rich universe of the Horus Heresy, the origin story of Warhammer 40,000. Play through epic single-player campaigns, take part in draft tournaments based on famous battles, or build your own unstoppable deck and compete in fast and epic duels against players worldwide.

name: MARVEL Puzzle Quest
description: Collect Marvel characters and upgrade your unstoppable squad in this epic Super Hero Puzzle RPG! Fight on the tactical Match-3 board where every move is crucial, and master head-to-head PvP tournaments alongside high-stakes events all year round!

name: Lost Light
description: Join the "Firefly" task force and unveil the sinister plot behind the exclusion zone in the world of Lost Light. You could either scavenge for supplies or go out with guns blazing and plunder. Survive the brutal domain where danger lurks in every corner!

name: Puzzle Together Multiplayer Jigsaw Puzzles
description: Multiplayer jigsaw puzzles with voice chat! Play on your own or with friends, and feel like you're all sitting around the same table. Millions of puzzle images, upload your own, or create any puzzle you can imagine just by describing it!

name: Skillshot City
description: Loot, shoot, cast and drive in this chaotic PvP Roguelite. Level up fast, draft wild skills, and create crazy combos on the fly. Explore a GTA-style battle royale with no queues or downtime as you prepare to win the final fight. Climb the ranks solo or with friends in 3-man squads!

name: Once Upon a Galaxy
description: ONCE UPON A GALAXY is an easy to learn Card Battler with incredible strategic depth and near infinite fun! Which of your favorite characters from myth and fairy tale will you choose?

name: Screw Drivers
description: Crazy physics and high-speed races! Craft vehicles cleverly by combining building blocks and mechanical parts to create powerful drivetrains. Unlock new parts, race for the gold, and challenge your friends in multiplayer.

name: Westland Survival
description: Saddle up for the ultimate survival adventure in the untamed Wild West! Build your homestead, tame the wilderness, bounty hunt the outlaws, and duel against the dangers that lurk on the frontier. Do you have what it takes to be a legend of the West?

name: Armored Warfare
description: Wage war against players from around the world with an unstoppable arsenal of 300+ powerful armored combat vehicles. Compete in PvP tank combat, complete co-op missions, and crush your enemies on breathtaking maps, from scorching deserts to neon-drenched urban jungles.

name: SMASH LEGENDS
description: Play Smash Legends for free! Smash Legends is an exciting PVP action brawler where fairy tale Legends engage in a lively battle. Play solo or in a 3v3 team battle with your friends! Play now with Smashers from all over the world on Steam, iOS, and Android!

name: Ebon Crucible
description: The arena where excuses die. Five classes, 63 abilities, ranked 1v1 and 2v2 where skill is all you have. Battle pass, live spectating, full crossplay. Free to play.

name: Castle Defender
description: This is an action/adventure game where you are a dragonborn knight running through multiple levels in a castle. Collect coins and slay enemies in each level. Don't forget to collect the key in each level so you can open the door at the end and finish.

name: Atomix
description: Atomix is a single player Arcade style First Person Shooter where you get to pilot mechanical suits across a unique Sci-Fi world.

name: Allelon
description: Play as Ollie and Spade, a rebel and detective, on both sides of a high-profile murder case, in a dual-character investigative-stealth experience. Discover the secrets plaguing the citizens of Andropolis.

name: Mannequin Syndrome
description: Mannequin Syndrome is a first-person survival horror game for solo play or 1–4 player online co-op. Enter the Syntrax Facility, complete objectives, restore critical systems, execute the shutdown, and escape as the mannequin threat becomes increasingly dangerous.

name: Landover
description: An all time classic strategy game reimagined! Play daily games, or real time classics, 1v1 or 4 player games. Build your own maps or play other custom maps for a new experience every time.

name: Candellum
description: Play as a candle warrior fighting to keep your flame alive in a world where fire means life and death. Steal wax from enemies to survive, wield your flame tactically in intense hack-and-slash combat, and uncover the dark secrets of a dormant wax factory filled with danger !

name: MechDrachen
description: Dive into non-stop action in a movement-based first person shooter, blending some of the most familiar gameplay elements of the genre into a completely new experience, build around the idea to have the most fun with your friends you could possibly have with a movement shooter.

name: Blindfire
description: Blindfire will be available to download for free from May 5th 2026 Blindfire delivers unique FPS action in pitch-black arenas. Rely on sound and high-tech gadgets to develop your skills in new ways. Ideal for quick, high-tension matches with friends.

name: 100 Hidden ASCII Cats
description: A cozy hidden-object puzzle set in massive worlds drawn entirely from ASCII text. Grab your magnifying glass and find 100 kittens hiding between the characters.

name: Kobayashi Clash of Conquest
description: Kobayashi Clan Of Conquest is a management and defense game set in a fantasy world populated by dragons where you develop your domain, build buildings, recruit heroes and defend your empire.

name: Picklemania: The Ultimate Showdown
description: Arcade-style pickleball game focused on fast, skill-based rallies. Move, aim, and time shots to control ball trajectory and outplay the opponents. Pick up a paddle and head straight in an intensive match!

name: Narik Chess
description: We combined various novel chess variants together in a single game. Time travel your pieces to new timelines! Cast spells to secure an advantage! Navigate around slimes following cellular automata rules!

name: COLDSNAP
description: Pilot S.N.A.P. and wield his heat-powered hammer Thermon to fight through layers of the planet’s crust, and restart its dying core. Master momentum-driven movement, chain devastating attack combos, and collect powerful enhancements to survive as the mechanical horde grows ever stronger.

name: Adrift
description: Wander a quiet forest, collect materials and uncover hidden items. Enjoy the peaceful ambiance and find all of your hiding mole friends!

name: Warped Universe
description: A sci-fi PvE looter shooter where the community drives the entire universe forward together. Every mission you run, solo or grouped, shapes a shared galaxy.

name: SHRIMP GAME: KRILL CONFIRMED
description: SHRIMP GAME: KRILL CONFIRMED is a solo or multiplayer third-person shooter RPG intro to SHRIMP GAME set in an abyssal realm. Pilot your SHRIMP platform to fight giant sea monsters, master elemental classes, and unearth secrets in a co-op campaign, or just krill your friends in multiplayer PVP!

name: The First Spine - Arena
description: The First Spine Arena is an exhilarating online competitive board and card game. In this game, players place their unique cards on a board with the goal of reaching their opponent's side. Each card is generated according to the player's level, ensuring a balanced and challenging experience for all.

name: Royal Wars: Farm TD
description: Royal Wars: Farm TD is a tower-defense game with strategy, luck, resourcemanagement and quick-thinking mechanics. Protect your base with Towersto defeat enemies in your path before they destroy it.

name: Tropicalypse
description: Tropicalypse is an action-packed first- and third-person zombie shooter set in a dangerous tropical world. With a changeable story shaped by your decisions, it offers unique gameplay every time. Fight hordes of undead and save me from my shit work and boss, thanks!

name: GRIDROYALE Battle Royale
description: A top-down battle royale with... a style meter? An offline battle royale? I know you want to try battling with highly trained AIs that will put up a fight with even the most talented players! Customizable characters, a battle pass, challenges, and much more come in this free indie game!

name: Meow My Crop!
description: Meow My Crop! is a cozy farming mini-game where every keystroke and click makes your crops grow. Team up or sneak around to steal your friends’ fruits, then trade your hard-earned harvest for cute decorations to style your own little plot.

name: Sweet Valentine Chocolatier
description: A cozy, heartwarming visual novel in which you take a familiar face (boy or girl) on a romantic spring festival date. Customize your player character (femme or masc) and play several low-stakes mini games!

name: Gather CCG
description: Gather CCG is a turn-based online card game where players take on the role of alchemists who compete by using elemental energy to cast units, spells, or weapons through their customized decks.

name: Canine Derby Manager
description: Manage your dog racing kennel in this management sim. Carefully craft you routine for training , hire the best staff and work your way from bottom of E-Rank to Champion status!

name: Sticky Fingers
description: Sticky Fingers is a goofy couch-coop game where two players each control a single hand of a master thief. Work with your friend to avoid security, navigate traps, and steal as much loot as you can before fleeing the scene.

name: Between Stops
description: Between Stops is a story-driven turn-based RPG with bullet-hell inspired combat. Dodge deadly boss patterns, shape character relationships, and unlock multiple routes where your choices permanently alter the story.

name: Jackpot Crash Course
description: In a game show starring only criminals, you must gamble against rival players to prove yourself worthy of being pardoned for your wrong deeds— But is the show really about proving your innocence? Jackpot Crash Course is a death game visual novel about crime, luck and spectacle.

name: ROSA's Quest
description: The ocean attacks! Aquatic creatures have seized control of the planet. Cities are in ruins, suburbs are flooded, and humans have not been seen since. In ROSA's Quest, take control of a Rescue Operations and Safety Android, destroy the leaders of the oceanic army, and recover what was lost.

name: Flash Diving
description: Short horror game where you survey the descent of a capsule through a hole in the middle of an ocean, with only 4 lights and your ears to ensure your surroundings remain clear.

name: Play Things
description: A psychological horror game about testing dolls and determining if they are Good or Dangerous. Play in a strange location with dolls potentially filled with bloodlust. Uncover secrets about who you are, where you are, and just WHAT is happening.

name: Project Rod3nt
description: Project Rod3nt is an action-adventure sandbox that mixes cute rod3nts with weapons of mass destruction to create the ultimate time-bending stealth-chaos experience. Play as cybernetic rodents and time travel to save the world. We want YOU for Project Rod3nt. Will you step up to join the cause?

name: Bourbon Risky
description: Bourbon Risky is a simple but deep boss rush action game with retro style graphics. Smash all enemies in your way with your eternal companion that blasting bullets and lasers!

name: Cosmonade
description: Cosmonade is a real-time PvP game — pilot a ship and destroy everything! Designed for players who enjoy gameplay that’s both simple and demanding... Face off against other players in matches where skill, team coordination, and reflexes make all the difference.

name: Ice Cream Simulator - Prologue
description: Prepare ice cream, serve customers, set your prices, and manage your shop in this limited-access prologue of ice cream simulator—get a taste of the full game.

name: ECH8
description: ECH8 is a single-player narrative puzzle game about uncovering the mystery behind the disappearance of an entire species. Communicate with their past to uncover the truth and decide the future of their species. Will you uncover the truth in time, or are you doomed to make the same mistakes?

name: duplicity loop
description: A dark magical girl VN that takes place in an Alice in Wonderland inspired world.

name: Choo Choo Boom Boom
description: Fight through two thrilling phases of an epic boss fight as the gunner of a repurposed air train, built to take on an alien entity known only as The Hand. Blast through 10 unique encounters with your trusty set of cannons, and rack up a high score to compete with your friends!

name: Jigsaw Puzzle Palace
description: Build beautiful jigsaw puzzles with up to 8,000 uniquely-cut pieces.

name: Cursed Isle
description: Cursed Isle is a linear action adventure built on tight sword combat, blocking, responsive movement, and a powerful blunderbuss. Collect magic artifacts, upgrade them, and bring mythical chaos to every fight.

name: It's too late to apologize.
description: A strange puzzle adventure in ancient ruins, defying worship and casting birthday cakes into the abyss.

name: WitchGhost
description: A chaotic survival shooter with roguelite elements. Blast through endless undead, unleash powerful magic, burn the world down in a storm of fire and explosions, die and try again

name: EXPLODES
description: EXPLODES is a fast-paced 2D stickman fighting game. Choose from 15 explosive weapons and battle across 10 unique arenas. Play solo against AI bots, fight friends locally on one keyboard, or take on players online. Level up, unlock gear, and dominate. Completely free to play with no paywalls.

name: S.O.R.N.
description: Glide, fly, and blast your way through Haven's facilities to discover the truth while facing friends and foes of your past along the way.

name: Donkee's Adventure
description: A simple, fast-paced 2D platformer where you survive chaotic challenges and explore different environments in a short but action-packed adventure.

name: Dusties
description: Dusties are looking for a little mischief! Let them roam your desktop to bring you three guaranteed benefits: charming company, unconditional support, and a sprinkle of pure chaos. Bring your friends along to join the party — you can have up to 100 Dusties filling your screen.

name: FARLOW
description: FARLOW - A love story about a Muslim slave and a Christian princess... A narrative action fighting game created by Rahad Ali. It blends story-driven dialogue and character interactions with straightforward melee combat.

name: Back In My Day
description: Explore, Strategize, Fight, and blast through this world! Back In My Day, every action has an opposite reaction and consequence. Can you make it home?

name: Last Line: Zombie Horde
description: <Last Line: Zombie Horde>Defend against endless zombie hordes. Each zombie has unique traits and skills. Use the gem system to adapt your strategy against different enemies. Upgrade gear by dismantling unwanted equipment for upgrade stones.

name: GAZED
description: An online PVP game about finding other players before they find you. Use deception and information from a variety of unique abilities to gain an edge. There are many ways to play, but only one way to lose. So whatever you do, don't get GAZED.

name: Dead Frontier 2
description: Survival horror MMO. As one of the few survivors of the outbreak, you must scratch a living out of the decaying ruins of society. Scavenge for supplies, improve your skills, and trade with other players. All the while, keeping your eyes peeled for the infected lurking around every corner.

name: Soul Dossier
description: Soul Dossier is a multiplayer game based on Oriental culture (5vS1). The game is based on a variety of traditional Oriental cultures, including five elements, eight diagrams and folklore.

name: Ultimate Custom Night
description: Welcome to the ultimate FNAF mashup, featuring 50 selectable characters and custom difficulties!

name: Dark Deception
description: Death awaits you in Dark Deception, a story-driven first-person horror maze game. There's nowhere to hide & nowhere to catch your breath. Run or die - it's your choice. Trapped in a realm of nightmarish mazes with a mysterious woman, your only hope of survival is to find a way to escape.

name: Counter-Strike Nexon
description: Counter-Strike Nexon is a Free to Play MMOFPS offering competitive PvP and PvE action including content from the original Counter-Strike and all new game modes, map creation function, weapons, and hordes of Zombies!

name: No More Room in Hell
description: The chances of you surviving this all out war of society and the undead are slim to none. Already, there are millions of the walking dead shambling about, searching for food to eat. There's no known cure. One bite can possibly end it all for you. However, you aren't alone in this nightmare.
developer: No More Room in Hell Team

name: Knight Online
description: The Great Battle between Karus and El Morad has arrived to Steam! Pledge allegiance to one of the Nations and put your skills to the test in one of the best PvP system in the MMORPG universe!

name: Dark Hours: Prologue
description: Dark Hours: Prologue is a free co-op survival horror game for 1-4 players. Your heist has been disrupted by a supernatural event, and your team of robbers is now trapped with a monster. Forget your plan, your mission: survive! Explore and cooperate to find a way out or hide and wish for daylight.

name: DARKEST DAYS
description: DARKEST DAYS is a zombie shooting RPG set in a post-apocalyptic world devastated by a sudden zombie outbreak. Explore a dark yet captivating open world, build a sanctuary with fellow survivors, grow stronger, and fight for survival.

name: We Were Here
description: Lost in a frozen wasteland and split up from your partner inside an abandoned castle, the only possession you have left is a walkie-talkie with a familiar voice on the other end. Can the two of you find your way out in time?

name: Cube Escape: Paradox
description: The tenth Cube Escape follows the story of detective Dale Vandermeer who finds himself trapped in two different universes and needs to escape. Cube Escape: Paradox will be released together with the accompanying Paradox: A Rusty Lake Film.

name: Quake Champions
description: Step into the Arena. Compete against players from around the world in this fast-paced shooter that combines the dark mythos of the original Quake with the skill-based competition of Quake III Arena. Become a Champion.

name: Garten of Banban 0
description: Explore the origins of the mysterious Banban’s Kindergarten. Survive the dark past of the establishment. Try to make some friends. Uncover the truth behind the place, and who you are…

name: PAPERHEAD EP.0
description: In this cute cardboard world, something went horribly wrong... You wake up in a prison cell. A strange voice calls to you from the depths of dark corridors covered in runic symbols and blood. Reload your trusty shotgun and find out... WHY WOULD CARDBOARD... BLEED?

name: 死寂（Deathly Stillness）
description: This is a boring zombie game with no plot, not an officially released game, please don't have high expectations.

name: Hello Neighbor Alpha 3
description: Alpha 3 of Hello Neighbor brought the first iteration of the large house. Hello Neighbor is a stealth horror game about sneaking into your creepy Neighbor's house.

name: Yume Nikki
description: This is a game in which you traverse the extremely dark world inside a dream.

name: BLOCKADE
description: BLOCKADE Classic! First Person Shooter in an editable procedural cubic world. A large arsenal of weapons, 4 teams at the same time and up to 32 players on one map. A large number of game modes!

name: TERPENIE
description: In the gloomy atmosphere of post-Soviet everyday life, routine tasks like cleaning, cooking, and exploring your own room hide something much darker. Survive and uncover the truth before the maniac comes for you.

name: BABBDI
description: Find your way out of BABBDI. A short, first person exploration experience.

name: Hello Neighbor 2 Alpha 1
description: Alpha 1 of Hello Neighbor 2 is back! It is a Stealth Horror Game where you’re being stalked by a mysterious creature as you try to track down Mr. Peterson who has disappeared after the events of the first game. Play against an advanced, self-learning AI that adapts to your every move.

name: Fish
description: you click fish to get fish.

name: Insanity Clicker
description: Been looking for the thrill? Then you've come to the right place! Insanity Clicker is a time-killer game full of horror and fear that will make you tremble in a couple of minutes!

name: Hello Guest: Hello Neighbor 2 pre-alpha
description: Hello Guest, beloved Hello Neighbor 2 pre-alpha, a stealth horror thriller with an advanced, self-learning AI. You take the night shift as a security guard at an abandoned Golden Apple Amusement Park where a creature is hiding in the shadows. What can go wrong?

name: Burger
description: 🍔 Burger is a clicker cooking game where you just click to make burgers — more and more burgers! Thinking about pizza 🍕 or eggs 🥚? Think again, because it's all about burgers! Free. 🍔✨

name: Dagon: by H. P. Lovecraft
description: Face unspeakable horrors. Succumb to madness. Welcome to a free daemonic narrative experience inspired by H. P. Lovecraft.

name: The Backrooms Game FREE Edition
description: Nothing but the stink of old, moist carpets, the madness of mono-yellow, and the blinding light of fluorescent bulbs at maximum hum-buzz. Over 600 million sq. miles of randomly segmented rooms. God save you if you hear something wandering nearby, because it sure as hell has heard you.

name: H.I.A: Horror Investigation Agency
description: H.I.A: Horror Investigation Agency is a fun multiplayer horror game in which you and co-players have to investigate exciting horror cases. Among finding victims and evidence of the horror event that has taken place, you will be faced with jumpscares and scary monsters along your investigation.

name: SCP: Nine-Tailed Fox
description: You are the leader of Foxtrot Unit 1, "Nine-Tailed Fox", a highly trained force tasked with re-containing a multitude of terrifying anomalous entities that have broken loose inside a top-secret research facility.

name: Last Year
description: Enter the nightmarish world of Last Year, where you and four other classmates try to survive, fight back and ultimately escape a horrifying Fiend in this unique horror asymmetric game.

name: Tales of Escape
description: "Tales of Escape" is a series of 6 person multiplayer escape room adventures for virtual reality or desktop pc! Gather your friends and choose a story to play!

name: The New Flesh
description: Explore the strange world within the screen in this ambient exploration experience featuring the music of Red Vox.

name: At Home Alone Final
description: A casual healing rpg that takes players on a journey around the house from the perspective of a young girl, what does she do when she's home alone? What strange things will you come across in the process, and while exploring, perhaps... What other strange secrets might you discover?

name: Missing Hiker
description: Missing Hiker is a short indie horror game, where your brother Ethan went missing while hiking and you need to find him.

name: Rental
description: Rental is a short and spooky adventure game about the dangers of renting a house in an unknown place.

name: Dave's Fun Algebra Class: Remastered
description: Dave's Fun Algebra Class: Remastered is a strategy-based indie game inspired by Baldi's Basics, featuring chaotic and intense gameplay mixed with an old-school psychedelic artstyle. Solve math problems, meet Dave's friends, and uncover the secrets of Dave's school.

name: click to ten
description: click to ten

name: TELEFORUM
description: TELEFORUM is a found-footage-styled horror game exploring the unknown side of media. You’re visiting a widow’s apartment to conduct an interview about her husband's death. But that’s not the main reason why you’re here. It’s all about the tape, isn’t it?

name: Silly's Gameshow
description: Silly's Gameshow is a short co-op animatronic horror game

name: Mr. Hopp's Playhouse
description: Every kid has that one toy that scares them, imagine if it came to life. You play as Ruby, a young girl who has a fear of her handmade toy called Mr. Hopp. Things take a dark turn when Ruby sees that Mr. Hopp, who usually sits motionless in the corner of her room, is gone.

name: Scream Collector
description: Build up a haunted house in this Halloween themed Idle Clicker game!

name: The Children of Clay
description: The Children of Clay is a short stop motion archeology horror game, where you have to study an ancient artefact and discover its dark secret.

name: Hello Charlotte EP2: Requiem Aeternam Deo
description: A eulogy for happiness, and a lament for connection that never was.

name: Joker Show - Horror Escape
description: Your parents left for the night, and you stayed at home alone, you were bored and you decided to call the Jester (Joker), but something went wrong... It looks like you succeeded, now the jester wants to play with you, hide and don't let him catch you, find a way to call the jester away.

name: Terroro
description: In this psychological horror game about a famous TikToker, you take on the role of her boyfriend to discover that behind their perfect life, nothing is as it seems. Duration 30 minutes.

name: Whimsical Artefacts

description: Welcome to Dustown is a single-player or cooperative horror game for up to 4 players. Play as field scientists exploring vast labyrinthine cornfields, collecting samples and evidence for a mysterious corporation. Make sure you don't get killed at the crossroads.

name: Minute Mark
description: Minute Mark is a 2D singleplayer platformer where you run, jump, and slide across hand-drawn levels at incredible speed, racing against a strict timer. Rewind your mistakes and make creative skips to chase the leaderboard.

description: “The Door in The Skybox” is a third-person puzzle game about manipulating door frames to connect fragmented spaces. Featuring a surreal, dreamlike style inspired by 19th–20th century art, the game spans fifteen levels, each with a distinct visual identity.

name: Aether FIR ATC Simulator
description: Take control of the airspace in Aether FIR ATC Simulator, an interactive Air Traffic Control simulator. Guide aircraft safely through your sector by issuing altitude, speed, and heading commands. Prevent mid-air collisions, manage complex traffic flows, or master challenging campaigns.

name: 야간근무 - Finding
description: A first-person psychological horror game where you monitor CCTV cameras, detect anomalies, and report them to survive a night shift in a military base.

description: Top-down racing game set in a fictional poor community that has an annual festival called Rua, where illegal races take place to determine the best racer from the Baixo do Reginaldo favela.
developer: Diogo Oliveira de Lima Gomes (Diogo OG)

name: Dodge-imals
description: Dodge-imals is a chaotic multiplayer dodgeball brawler where ragdoll physics meets skill-based, team-driven combat. Throw, catch, deflect, and tackle your way through fast-paced arenas built for both hilarious moments and skillful plays.

name: Zoo 2: Animal Park
description: Zoo 2: Animal Park – Take care of wild and tame zoo animals in this animal game!

name: My Free Zoo
description: A small zoo needs your help! As the new manager, it's your job to boost business. Design the zoo of your dreams. From wolves and polar bears all the way to prehistoric beasts – the further you progress in the game, the more exotic the animals you'll be able to keep in your zoo. Play now and save the zoo!

description: An anime android maid and her work drone are meeting a quota at the warehouse! A simple yet engaging game about the monotonous, relaxing process of working as a mover. Short but challenging levels, multiplayer, and lots and lots of boxes await you!

name: Physics Play

name: Bible Quiz: Trivia Game

name: Xeno Finder
description: A local multiplayer social deduction game for friends—featuring 8 categories and 240 unique expressions to keep every round fresh.

name: Beyond the Soil: Farming & Tales Prologue
description: In this free prologue to Beyond the Soil: Farming & Tales, build a life from scratch in the heart of nature. Cultivate the land, manage resources, help the valley residents, and write the first pages of a world full of mysteries. Your farming legend starts here!

name: OuterTide
description: OuterTide is a First-Person Exploration Platformer about a lone astronaut crash-landing into an asteroid belt hovering around a planet. Grapple throughout this mysterious environment, encounter alien creatures, and collect scrap to repair your ship.

description: You’re Melon, a tiny hamster with a huge goal. Collect mix-ins, roll fast, and build momentum to churn the biggest ice cream scoop ever in this whimsical, on-rails runner.

name: InVein
description: Traverse this never-ending hospital as you discover clues of where and who you are. As each day passes by, the world around you decays, and you can’t help but wonder what is real. Utilize your time and resources as you roam these collapsing halls, but be careful; you may not be alone after all...

name: sportive
description: Sportive is a online deck building card game with a sports theme. You compete against a Bot or other players, building up your playbook, gaining points, and redeeming them for trophies. The person with the most trophies at the end of the game wins.

description: Dive into this terrifying adventure as you solve challenging puzzles that will put your skills to the test. Equip your charge crossbow and activate the colored buttons in time. Run and use your wits to survive Funnybear, who will be stalking you in every corner of the park.

name: A Playground Afternoon
description: A 3D platforming party game, play with your friends in a colourful environment and enjoy yourselves!

name: Jewels of Rome: Match-3 Game and City Builder
description: A story-driven match-3 game set in the Roman Empire. Rebuild a fallen settlement and turn it into a large, thriving city. Choose what to build first, complete character quests to explore the story, and solve challenging puzzles. Join limited-time events, play mini-games, and team up with friends.

name: Skate Rush: 90s Retro Arcade

name: Disillusion

name: CAMERAMAN NEVER DIES

name: World of Warships: Legends
description: Join this free-to-play PvP online naval shooter with fast-paced combat, easy-to-learn gameplay, intuitive controls, and cross-platform play on Steam, console, and mobile. Choose from 600+ warships and 150+ Commanders, and master tactics on diverse maps. Play now and become a legend!

name: ERROR143

name: Motherless - Season 1
description: Motherless is a captivating story-driven visual novel for mature audiences. Follow the story of Sunny, a young man who was separated from his loved ones at birth. Join him on a journey of self-discovery, as he reconnects with people from his past and uncovers the secrets of his childhood.

name: Kink.inc [18+]
description: The Kinkverse is yours, Vice Mayor! With an army of hot, loyal girls on staff, you are on the climb for political power and panty-dropping piles of cash. Run an empire of sex toys as you handle every lubed up mess your kooky mayor creates, and explore thematic universes to seduce more sexy babes.

name: Dr. Langeskov, The Tiger, and The Terribly Cursed Emerald: A Whirlwind Heist
description: A 15 minute heist game by Crows Crows Crows & Directed by William Pugh (The Stanley Parable). Slip into the soft-soled shoes of the mastermind responsible for the greatest heist- oh god I can’t do this any more, i’m joining the strike. good luck writing the steam description. -tina

name: The Lancaster Leak - Entity Exam
description: YOU CONTROL THE FOUND FOOTAGE. Another tape has been leaked, this time a recording of a training protocol. By answering questions and resisting jumpscares, can you beat the Entity Exam?

name: Serena
description: How long has it been? A man sits in a distant getaway cabin waiting for his wife Serena. Where is she? Things in the cabin evoke memories, and the husband comes to a disturbing realization... This short point-and-click adventure is the result of a massive collaborative effort between dozens of fans and designers of adventure games.

name: He Fucked The Girl Out of Me
description: He Fucked The Girl Out Of Me is a semi-autobiographical narrative visual novel about trauma and sex work made for the gameboy. The author explains how sex work impacted her life and changed her perception of the world. The game takes approximately 40 minutes to play from start to finish.

name: Moe Era
description: Welcome to Moe Era, the era of cute things! It has everything but a hero to help four adorable girls. You're the one they're waiting for!

name: Deluge: Threnody of Crashing Waves
description: In the not so distant past, the Isle of Abbot underwent a mysterious evacuation event. Delve into the secrets of this unsettling place and elicit the girls' tragic fate. An interactive visual novel with psychological and lovecraftian undertones.

name: Lake of Voices
description: A free horror Visual Novel about an ill-fated journey across Sinnlos, a lake where gruesome monsters lurk just beneath the surface. With times being so dire you'll need to decide what, and who, is going to be sacrificed. Anyone can be saved, but not everyone can be.

name: one night, hot springs
description: Haru is invited by her old friend Manami to spend a night at the hot springs. All Haru wants to do is enjoy the hot springs like everyone else, but she doesn't want to cause any trouble...

name: One Thousand Lies
description: One day, Ciarán starts receiving enigmatic emails from a mysterious sender, turning his everyday life into a mess of a romantic comedy with psychological themes mixed in. What lies beyond the mystery he's been presented with? In the words of Harry H.: "If you want to know the truth, go find it".

name: Sleeping With Sakuya Izayoi
description: In this small visual novel, lay down and relax with Sakuya Izayoi. Talk to her, kiss her or just simply enjoy each other's presence! Chose between 3 different locations featuring stunning artwork in this Touhou Project Fangame.

name: The Test: Secrets of the Soul
description: You will answer a series of questions that will reveal things from deep within. Some will be uncomfortable, but with great knowledge comes great sacrifice. Can you make it all the way through The Test, and are you SURE you want the answers you seek? For it is time to unlock "Secrets of the Soul..."

name: Evening Surprise
description: Max and his girlfriend Ann are very happy together. They have no arguments, they enjoy spending time with each other, they are in love. What else can they wish? Well, Max, you will get a big surprise this evening...

name: Star Fetchers
description: The introduction to a wild ride with gangsters and deep state conspiracy theories

name: Krypta FM
description: Can you solve the mystery of the Beast of Gozdary?
notes: Not reviewed yet 💀 Dead game (no players ≥14d)

name: TRY AGAIN
description: You're Benny, a test character trapped in an unfinished game by a figure called The Designer. She's up against a deadline for her publisher which means it's your last day as a test character. Navigate the facility, dodge game-dev chaos and defy expectations to become the main character.

name: Perfect Vermin
description: Your task is simple, exterminate all vermin. The sledge hammer you have been provided is capable of destroying almost all office appliances and furniture that may be uncooperative. Your time is running out.

name: Days Without Incident
description: It has been -̷̯͙̔̈́-̴̱̽̓͝-̷̍̊̕͠  days without incident. Your investigation has brought you to an old metalworks factory, abandoned after a series of mysterious deaths. But something’s been growing in the quiet. A short first-person survival horror experience.

name: Gunspell 2 – Match 3 Puzzle RPG
description: Gunspell 2 is an RPG Match 3 fighting game with a strong focus on realtime PvP battles. The game features multiple opportunities to collect and combine spells, guns and powers to win in a battle.

name: Prison Simulator Prologue
description: Wanna find out what a prison riot looks like? Check a free stand-alone prologue for Prison Simulator. A story that is not available in the full game! Be warned: Police baton might not be enough to bring order to the prison halls.

name: Backrooms: Found Footage
description: Backrooms: Found Footage is a single-player horror game where you are the main character trying to survive the Backrooms. Curiosity wins and you decide to explore this weird place that you got trapped in. What could go wrong?

name: Project Crypt
description: Project Crypt: The horror adventure about escaping a city overrun by monsters.

name: Aviators
description: An educational adventure game about Polish air personnel during World War II. Meet the pilots of the 1586 Special Destiny Squadron and join them on incredible assignments. Explore and solve puzzles to learn more about the history of Polish aviation.

name: The Backroom - Lost and Found
description: The Backroom - Lost and Found is a story rich adventure game with some horror elements. Why is there an orphaned room hidden away in the depths of a strange liminal space? Is it "the backrooms" or something else? CYOA? SCP? Weirdcore? No clipping? And what's with the cute paintings?

name: When the Darkness comes
description: When the Darkness comes is a walking simulator whose glitchy and dark tale tries to illustrate the hardships of depression and anxiety through a variety of imaginary digital landscapes.

name: Slender Threads: Prologue
description: In this paranormal point-and-click adventure, a traveling salesman races to stop a string of horrific deaths in a quiet seaside town—before he’s next.

name: Runo
description: A walking simulator about dear memories, overcoming obstacles, and finding your path. Experience a story inspired by finno-karelian folklore.
notes: Not reviewed yet 💀 Dead game (no players ≥14d)

name: Varenje
description: Varenje is a cute colorful adventure with a number of puzzles and mini-games made by artists for anyone that considers games to be an art.

name: Artificial Fashionista
description: Fashion police, open up! Collect clothes, put together fashionable outfits, and impress your captors — for a chance to regain access to the outside world!

name: Happy New Year, Zeliria!
description: This is a New Year's fairy tale and at the same time a small spin-off of the first part of the game Zeliria Sactuary.

name: Her Lie I Tried To Believe
description: Her Lie I Tried To Believe is a short kinetic novel about the persisting hatred of a boy throughout his life, the destructive relationship that was born from it, and the consequences he had to face as a direct result.

name: Kid,napper: Gosh, I'm Kidnapped by a Pupil
description: I had to admit, the only thing that is more scary than a murder weapon, is that girl, who is not even supposed to hold it

name: Panzer Hearts - War Visual Novel
description: Build the tanks, Date the girls, Choose your side. Live through the adventure and drama of an alternate universe World War 2.

name: Momotype
description: An experimental, horror visual novel about raising a virtual pet. Help a tamagotchi-like creature navigate his angst. We love Momo!

name: BLACK BOX LSS - The Shining Immortal
description: Immerse yourself in a pixel-art visual novel that blends thrilling crime, romantic comedy, and the pursuit of love. This game depicts the story of a new employee pursuing his female boss.

name: Rising Angels: Reborn
description: Despite determination and skill, Natalie Puccile, a Special Investigations and Tactics officer, has spent her career watching over a listening post in the middle of deep space. After the orders that she has always dreamed of arrive, she finds herself in charge of a small destroyer and tasked with discovering the fate of a missing...

name: The Test: Secrets of the Soul 2
description: You will answer questions that will reveal things deep within. Some will be uncomfortable, but with great knowledge comes great sacrifice. Can you make it all the way through The Test, and are you SURE you want the answers you seek? For it is time to once again unlock "Secrets of the Soul..."

name: Cemetery Mary
description: A visual novel about a girl who loves the cemetery. When her parents go missing, she receives a mysterious text that has the potential to completely ruin her life...or fix it?

name: Nin Online
description: Fight and train with powerful Jutsu to rise through the ranks of your village in a ninja open-world MMORPG. Join over a hundred thousand players worldwide. Play now for free!

name: World of Warplanes
description: World of Warplanes is an aerial combat MMO action game set in the Golden Age of military aviation. The game throws players into a never-ending battle for dominance of the skies.

name: Shinobi Warfare
description: Play an 2d turn based RPG multiplayer game, stylize your own shinobi and play different game modes alone or with your friends! Level up, unlock various items and skills and procced in your journey of becoming the next Kage!

name: SCP: Containment Breach Multiplayer
description: Multiplayer survival horror game based on stories from the SCP Foundation. The game is about a facility containing anomalous entities known as SCPs. When a catastrophic containment breach occurs at one of the facilities, it is your main goal to escape the facility. Try to escape with your friends!

name: Crossout
description: Crossout - the postapocalyptic MMO action game where you can create a unique design for an armoured vehicle from dozens of parts and then drive it into multiplayer battles raging on land and in the skies alike.

name: Play Together
description: Play Together is a popular casual social networking game enjoyed by players worldwide. Express yourself through character customization, decorate your home and host Home Parties for a fun time with friends. Enjoy tons of content with friends from all across the globe!

name: Pixel Worlds: MMO Sandbox
description: Pixel Worlds is a free-to-play sandbox MMO where players build worlds, craft items, explore dungeons, farm resources, and trade in a player-driven economy, all within a shared online universe rebuilt as a fresh start for a fair and stable long-term experience.

name: DC Universe™ Online
description: DC Universe Online is a Free-to-Play, massive multiplayer online action game set in the popular DC Universe. Become one of a new breed of Heroes or Villains and wield incredible powers as you go to war with legendary characters such as Batman, Superman, Lex Luthor and The Joker.

name: THE OFFICE ROOMS
description: A short exploration game blending liminal spaces and corporate dystopia. Explore an abandoned anomaly control facility and uncover its past and purpose!

name: MUZY
description: Explore the mystery behind a once-loved and hugely popular children's toy, also known as MUZY, in this terrifying horror adventure game. Several reports detail frightening incidents connected to accidents. Your job is to solve the puzzles and find the cause of these unsettling occurrences.

name: Allods Online RU
description: Tighten the ranks on your path to glorious victories in Allods Online! Team up with your friends to explore the dangers of the mysterious Astral. Together you will prevail!

name: my eyes deceive
description: Set over the course of roughly a week, you play as a young girl who has been living in a shelter all her life. The outside world is infected with a deadly disease. Society is in chaos. Fortunately, your papa is protecting you.

name: The Awesome Adventures of Captain Spirit
description: Have you ever dreamt of being a superhero? Meet Chris, a creative and imaginative 9 year old boy who escapes reality with fantastical adventures as his alter ego, the Awesome Captain Spirit! Captain Spirit is a free demo set in the Life is Strange universe. Contains links to Life is Strange 2

name: Half-Life: A Place in the West
description: In a devastated America, sinister commandos are kidnapping children and taking them to a hidden city with a mysterious cosmic tower at its heart – a tower that may prove to be humanity’s salvation, or its doom. Join three survivors in this fan-made comic as they attempt to unlock the city’s secrets.

name: Summerland
description: Summerland is a first-person narrative game about morality and the afterlife. You take control of Matthew, a detective reliving the events of his past, being questioned on his morals along the way. In every door lies another memory, and every memory unlocks another door.

name: 白昼梦 · 心象病院
description: This is a pixel style puzzle game, including a certain micro-horror elements. Truth is blind love. Retrieve your memory and escape from this horrible hospital.

name: Raji: Prologue
description: Raji: An Ancient Epic is an action-adventure game set in ancient India. A young girl named Raji has been chosen by the gods to stand against the demonic invasion. She must use the powers granted to her by the gods to rescue her brother as she battles to face the demon lord Mahabalasura.

name: Apotheorasis • Lab of the Blind Gods | Prologue
description: An FPS with ZERO graphics!? Yes, you heard right ! Run • Blast • Escape • Survive, through sound alone, as you challenge your makers and unravel the mysteries of your existence. You may be blind, but you're far from helpless !

name: Four Rendezvous
description: Hero meets a mysterious girl in the park. Who is that girl? What is a mystery surrounding her? And what about the world they met in? There's definitely something wrong with it. So many questions! So the hero has to deal with all of it to find his love.

name: Playing Kafka
description: There are things that often fail on nothing but themselves. Is there even a way out? Playing Kafka is a narrative adventure full of impenetrable schemes, insidious plot twists and conversations that slip out of hand. Based on Kafka’s life and his work, developed with Kafka experts.

name: The Terrible Old Man
description: Experience a bite-sized slice of Lovecraftian horror in this updated version of our cult freeware point and click adaptation of H.P. Lovecraft's classic short story.

name: The Last Train
description: In the barren wasteland on the brink of extinction, the last Train departs, supposedly carrying its passengers in search of a place where they can survive. A creature named Eilf boards the Train, determined to travel to Spring - the station that has been said to have vanished.

name: Neverwinter
description: Neverwinter is a free, action MMORPG based on the acclaimed Dungeons & Dragons fantasy roleplaying game. Epic stories, action combat and classic roleplaying await those heroes courageous enough to enter the fantastic world of Neverwinter!

name: Trove
description: Grab your friends, hone your blades, and set off for an epic procedurally generated adventure in Trove! Battle the Shadow in realms filled with dungeons and items created by your fellow players. Whether hunting treasure or building realms of your own, it’s never been this good to be square!

name: War of the Three Kingdoms
description: 《三国杀》是一款拥有沉浸体验感的以三国时代为背景的线上卡牌游戏。玩家可扮演三国时期人物，根据随机抽中的隐藏身份（主公、反贼、忠臣、内奸），通过使用独特的人物技能，合理打出各种类型的手牌，运筹帷幄、智取搏杀，获得自己所属身份的胜利！ 《三国杀》将三国历史与桌面游戏结合在一起。以桌面游戏独有的方式向玩家展示了一个个鲜活的三国人物，一段段精彩的三国故事。以身份、势力或阵营等为线索，以卡牌为形式，合纵连横，经过一轮一轮的谋略和动作获得最终的胜利。三国杀集合历史、文学、美术等元素于一身，在中国广受欢迎。
developer: 杭州游卡网络技术有限公司
publisher: 杭州游卡网络技术有限公司

name: Business Tour - Board Game with Online Multiplayer
description: Business Tour is a free-to-play multiplayer tabletop game. Build your own monopoly, play with friends, complete daily tasks, and compete against players from around the world. Easy to learn, fun to master, and perfect for quick matches.

name: Super Animal Royale
description: Welcome to the coziest way to kill your friends. Super Animal Royale is a 64-player, top-down 2D battle royale where adorably murderous animals fight tooth, claw, and machine gun. Then, relax in Super Animal World with fishing, hamsterball races, and story quests before the next fight to the death.

name: Farlight 84
description: Hey Lightcatchers! Are you ready for massive 60-player shootouts? Enjoy fast-paced hero shooter action in Farlight 84!

name: War of Dots
description: Easy to learn, hard to master. A simple & free RTS game.

name: Muck
description: Muck is a survival-roguelike. Collect resources, find items & build a base to survive for as long as you can.

name: Trick and Treat - Visual Novel
description: Trick & Treat is a Visual Novel that test your instincts by making choices that can get you out from the cursed forest or drive you to death… or maybe just maybe your choices can guide you to something more?

name: Chronicles of Tal'Dun: The Remainder - Act 1
description: A dark fantasy tale where death is not the end but the path to the truth. Two magi trapped in a collapsing tower must unravel a deadly mystery. Each death reveals another piece of the puzzle that is their shared past and forbidden love. For fans of House in Fata Morgana and literary dark fantasy.

name: Kathana
description: Adventure awaits in Kathana Select your character, quest with friends, face challenging bosses, explore dungeons, and engage in guild wars and PvP battles!

name: SUPREMACY: WORLD WAR 3
description: This Long Term Strategy Game lets you take control of the armed forces of your nation. Become responsible for its military expansion, technological research and economic development. Form alliances and wage total war for global dominance on the battlefields of World War 3.

name: MIR4
description: MIR4 is a free-to-play open world K-fantasy MMORPG that can be cross-played on both PC and mobile devices. MIR4 is full of action and features numerous large scale clan PVP battles. Join now and become a legend.

name: NosTale - Anime MMORPG
description: NosTale is a free-to-play anime action MMORPG which takes you on an exciting journey through a world full of mystery with your friends. More than 30 specialist classes and tons of loyal pets provide plenty of excitement and variety in PvP, PvE and raids

name: Slapshot: Rebound
description: Slapshot: Rebound is a physics-based multiplayer game where you play an arcade style match of hockey. No shoot button, no puck glue, no RNG. It’s up to you and your team to take control of the puck, pass, shoot, outplay your opponents. Play with your friends or team up with other Slapshot players!

name: Poker Master - Texas Hold'em, Roulette, Blackjack, Baccarat, Omaha, Slots, Teen Patti
description: Free chips!Including Texas Hold'em, Slots, Blackjack, Teen Patti, Omaha, Baccarat, Roulette and more poker games.

name: Crab Game
description: Crab Game is a First-Person Multiplayer game where you play through several different minigames based on children's games, until only one player stands victorious.

name: Operation: Harsh Doorstop
description: Operation: Harsh Doorstop is the ultimate, free to play, tactical shooter sandbox. Play singleplayer, multiplayer, or co-op modes and explore thousands of community-created maps, weapons, and vehicles via the Steam Workshop. Created by ex-developers of Squad, Red Orchestra, and Insurgency.

name: Galaxy Life
description: The universe is full of Starlings, tiny orange aliens that want to take over the galaxy. Create your own space colony, fight epic battles and discover new planets. Train your soldiers, develop your technology and create unimaginable gadgets. Enjoy this huge social game with friends!

name: Minion Masters
description: An addictive fast-paced hybrid of Card games & Tower-Defense. Play 1v1 - or bring a friend for 2v2 - and engage in epic online multiplayer battles full of innovative strategy and awesome plays! Collect 200+ cards with unique mechanics, all free!

name: Battle Tanks: World War II
description: Are you ready to fight? Download this incredibly addictive tank game right now! Choose a tank and fight with your friends in dynamic real-time battles.Meet the legendary tank shooter Battle Tanks! Show the whole world who's in charge here!

name: Freestyle 2: Street Basketball
description: Freestyle 2: Street Basketball is a fast paced online arcade basketball game. Create your own unique player and compete in the online street league! Use variety of b-ball moves and customize your player! Team up with the best street ballers online and rise to the top!

name: VALKYRIE CONNECT
description: Enjoy deep character growth and co-op boss battles in this JRPG.

name: Legend of YMIR
description: Forge your destiny in Legend of YMIR, a next-generation MMORPG inspired by Norse mythology and powered by Unreal Engine 5. Master skill-based combat, lead your clan to glory in massive server wars, and carve your name among the legends.
notes: Có DLC trả phí; nProtect GameGuard [Kernel]

name: Supremacy: Call of War 1942
description: Take over the control of one of the mighty nations during the times of World War 2 in this persisting long-term strategy game. Conquer provinces, forge alliances and build up your economy in real-time. Research top secret weapons of World War 2 and become the one true superpower!

name: BAPBAP
description: Join BAPBAP, the Roguelike Party game where no two matches are ever the same. Round up your homies, pick a character, and build a giga-unfair build that'll make them hate you - then do it all over again!

name: Lost girl`s [diary]
description: A group of girls are having their vacation, alone. What would a group of girls do on a dark Christmas night? Of course, fortunetelling! Unfortunately for them, their boyfriends are not about to leave them alone and their sudden visit totally ruins their plans for fortune telling, turning it into a scary story contest.

name: Without a Voice
description: In the depths of a forest, an exiled princess whiles her time in solitude. One day, a mysterious, beautiful maiden appears, throwing her world out of its alignment. A dark fantasy visual novel following the intertwining paths of these two women. In seven days, the wheel of fate will splinter...

name: Vampire Slave 1: A Yaoi Visual Novel
description: The world's most ancient vampire, a young & unprepared new leader of a centuries old vampire-hunting organization, thrust together by fate. Thalos knows he's found his beloved, but Dusty must never let himself grow close to a vampire. A kinetic visual novel that grows spicier with each installment!

name: SC2VN - The eSports Visual Novel
description: SC2VN is a visual novel about the South Korean StarCraft 2 scene. You play as Mach, a foreign semi-pro trying to make it in eSports who soon learns that success in StarCraft takes more than in-game strategy.

name: Fallstreak
description: A golden dream, and a closed world. A spiral staircase into the garden of the mind. What lies beyond gilded wonderland?

name: Seduce Me the Otome
description: A romantic comedy visual novel centered around a girl named Mika Anderson, who gets entangled in the affairs of incubi.

name: Cooking Companions: Appetizer Edition
description: Cabbage and the Chompettes want to play hide and seek! Can you find all five of them?

name: Degraman: Act I. Vincent
description: An otome visual novel - play a powerless victim of a terrifying, unfair world. 200+ choices, 50+ endings, 20+ hours of play - and only one way to escape.

name: Lam Lam
description: One night, "I" noticed that the neighbor was making some noise as usual. Just at this moment, I heard the cry of a girl from Room F. "I" used my superpowers to see what was going on next door. What awaits the "me" will be a heinous and heartbreaking scene.

name: Lucid9: Inciting Incident
description: Lucid9 is a visual novel focused on a web of intricate mysteries set in the fictional 2018 metropolis of Isamu. Lucid9: Inciting Incident is the first part of the story, focused on a string of disappearances that occur at a prestigious, uppity boarding academy.

name: Layover Lovers
description: A terminal love story

name: Adolescent Santa Claus
description: This visual novel game tells the tale of a cute little Santa Clause appearing

name: Interview with the Horny Ghost
description: Interview with the Horny Ghost is a super short, super free Adult Visual Novel made for a game jam. In the game you play a single-minded and perverted ghost and learn some lessons along the way.

name: Bring Me that Shawarma
description: A visual novel about shawarma, consisting of multiple episodes.

name: Juniper's Knot
description: Juniper's Knot is a short (~30 mins) kinetic novel about the meeting of a demon and a boy. A kinetic novel is a game that uses text, sound, and illustrations to tell a story.

name: Grey Instinct
description: In this cyberpunk 2D point-and-click adventure game, play as Grey, an amateur detective. Unravel the mystery by searching for clues, solving puzzles, talking to the mask-wearing residents of New Corium, and, if you have time, maybe go on a date!

name: Pathmaster
description: 『Pathmaster』 is a free fantasy visual novel with multi endings and various heroines.

name: Who Is Mike - A Visual Novel
description: You wake up with an aching head and the world out of focus. In front of you is a man accusing you of being “fake”. He looks exactly like you, down to the last scar and pimple, has the same memories, the same voice and the same personality. But who is lying and who is telling the truth? Who is fake and who is real?

name: CUPID - A free to play Visual Novel
description: "Love is both poison and cure, both knife and remedy." Set in 18th Century France, this is a gothic romance tale about loss, revenge and the different faces of love.

name: Love Thyself - A Horatio Story
description: In a society where everyone is a clone of the Emperor, can you survive long enough to find out who you truly are? Try out the brand new visual novel set in the Endless Universe!

name: I'll Do It Tomorrow
description: It's Sara's first day of work. However, when she takes the elevator to go to the office, she suddenly finds herself on a mysterious floor. What truth lies behind these weird rooms? Will you be able to move on? Or rather... will you want to move on?

name: fishy
description: Fishy is a heartfelt visual novel about friends, enemies, acceptance, and monsters. Explore the aquarium, face your fears, and maybe make a friend. here fishy fishy f̵̥͘͠i̷̱͉͋͑s̵͙̈͘h̵͖̅y̶̜͘

name: AploVVare Collection
description: You found an old game console along with some games at a garage sale. You remember playing these as a kid, and couldn't resist getting it. Maybe you could give them a whirl, just for old time's sake?

name: Jasper and the City of Lights
description: A cozy adventure about love, kindness and slowing down. Two siblings are separated, a mystical forest is where they were last seen. In the darkest shadows, an old spirit is hiding, but the lights of an ancient city is shining between the branches. Fully narrated, easy to play.

name: Blue Wednesday: Prologue
description: An experience filled with stories and music See the world through the eyes of jazz pianist, Morris. takes you through a dream-like adventure through jazz and love, and failure.

name: A Date in the Park
description: A short and mysterious free point and click adventure game, inspired by the feeling of oddness in an everyday situation.

name: The Missing Parts of Maria Gwozdek
description: The Missing Parts of Maria Gwozdek is a dark fantasy visual novel about fulfilling your aspirations by sacrificing parts of yourself. Literally.

name: DIGITAL EXORCIST case_(0);
description: Step into a dark world where cyberdemons haunt humankind. When mutilated bodies start appearing all over this sleepy town in the Mississippi inaka, Sawyer, ex-AGENCY operative; now unemployed shut-in, must exorcise the demon perpetrator in this story-rich, PC-98 style adventure game.

name: Mondealy: Day One
description: Mondealy: Day One is a prologue for the 2D adventure game Mondealy. You can see how adventures in the magical kingdom of Dargratt begin.

name: Mortgage nightmares
description: Your very own apartment, even if it's a 20-year mortgage – what could be better? Maybe the fact that Lena isn’t the only one living in this apartment? Or maybe they're not exactly people...

name: The Robot Girl Meets The Human!
description: This is an adventure game that takes you on a journey through a world after humans have disappeared. Lead the robot girl "Scarlet" to find the surviving humans.

name: Lost Connections
description: If she leaves now you will never see her again. Would you have enough courage to take a step, or would you stay quiet and regret it? Experience this story about love and loss.

name: Batography
description: Play as a curious bat on his mission to take a full fledged photo of the moon. Run, Climb, Glide and Snap your way through an array of obstacles while interacting with the cheeky characters in the neighbourhood. Can you collect all the moon cakes?

name: Impasto
description: Impasto is a first-person horror adventure game inspired by the works and legacy of Francisco Goya, the revered yet tortured Spanish painter. Set within a world irreversibly altered by his fraying sanity, the player must use both stealth and wits to survive.

name: Infestation: The New Z
description: The New Z is a FREE TO PLAY multi-game mode experience. SURVIVE with friends and gather loot, stash and trade. Go into wars against other groups in a massive OPEN WORLD or face them 5 v 5 in COMPETITIVE.

name: SpellForce 3 Versus Edition
description: The SpellForce 3: Versus Edition gives you the chance to enter the battlefields of Eo for free, letting you test your RTS skills against AI opponents or even other human players.

name: Puzzle Pirates
description: Every activity in Puzzle Pirates is a uniquely fun puzzle: be it sailing, gunning, or hauling treasure, your own puzzling skill determines your success!

name: CosmicBreak Universal
description: CosmicBreak Universal is an MMO action game that lets you play massive battles of up to 30 vs 30 players using customizable robots and humanoids! Create your own original character and aim for victory with your allies!

name: Alien Swarm: Reactive Drop
description: Co-operative top-down shooter game available for free. An epic bug hunt featuring a unique blend of co-op play and squad-level tactics.

notes: VAC (Valve Anti-Cheat); additional custom server-side anti-cheat on dedicated servers [Non-Kernel]

name: Elsword
description: Elsword is a free-to-play, online action RPG that uses classic side-scrolling game mechanics in an immersive manga inspired world.

name: Town of Sins
description: Town of Sins is a cheeky card game with a unique battle system. Corrupt the city you stumble upon and recruit innocent babes to turn them into powerful women. Upgrade your cards, engage in steamy battles, enjoy epic adventures, and collect the sexiest girls.

name: RIFT
